body.title: Add epsilon-greedy noise to habit scoring for spontaneous exploration
body.result: Added epsilon-greedy Gaussian noise (±0.05, 8% prob per habit) to BG scoring loop in basal_ganglia.py after inhibition penalty, before threshold comparison. Gated by IGOR_HABIT_NOISE_ENABLED (default off) with IGOR_HABIT_NOISE_PROB and IGOR_HABIT_NOISE_SIGMA env vars for tuning. Prevents winner-take-all lock-in on habitually dominant responses. All 1684 tests pass.
body.description: Habit selection is fully deterministic — when nothing triggers, nothing happens. Biological brains have ~1-2Hz baseline spontaneous firing. Fix: inject weak Gaussian noise (±0.05 jitter, ~5-10% probability per turn) into BG habit scores before threshold comparison; add occasional random-walk impulse injection from CuriositySource when TWM is below salience threshold. Makes Igor non-silent when idle. Neuro finding from deep-audit Panel 3.
